quotes.text: Please add Tagging feature in the MF section. This would ease one to tag the MFs on its purpose. Example: Studies, Retirement, Education etc
I trade through MTF, and wallet balance showing anything in any time. Even if market closed balance not showing correct amount, it decreased
I am loving the interactive layout. The EMI calculator helped me figure out my exact repayment capacity before choosing the best partner bank. 🤗

action_ideas: Prioritize fixing real-time wallet balance display accuracy, especially for MTF trading, to resolve critical trading issues.
Implement a tagging feature for Mutual Funds to improve user organization and portfolio management capabilities.
Enhance interactive data visualization and tools across the platform, mirroring successful features like the EMI calculator.
